markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Conduct a listening tour to gather feedback from Managing Editors (MEs) on current processes, challenges, and potential improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [MEs value autonomy but struggle with CM inconsistency and high workloads](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Standardization of processes and CM skill sets is needed to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Atlas needs improvement; Cloud Projects currently offer a better user experience](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=2212.0)
  - [More training and documentation are required for onboarding and consistent output](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)

## Topics

### ME Workload and Responsibilities

  - [MEs are juggling multiple clients with varying needs and complexities](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Time split between client-facing work and internal team management (roughly 50-50)](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [Editing content still takes significant time, impacting capacity for strategic work](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=2867.0)
  - [MEs often absorb tasks that should be handled by CMs (e.g., keyword research)](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

### Content Manager (CM) Performance

  - [Inconsistent skill levels among CMs lead to variable output quality](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Need for better onboarding and training, especially in SEO and content writing](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Ideal CM can take strategy input and produce client-ready content with minimal ME editing](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Suggestion to map CM skills and standardize their capabilities across the team](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

### Platform and Tools

  - [Atlas currently has limitations, often "fighting" users with hard-coded elements](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=2181.0)
  - [Cloud Projects offer more flexibility and ease of use for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=2212.0)
  - [Need for more granular control over individual steps in content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=3441.0)
  - [Upcoming agentic workflows and assistant features show promise for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=3378.0)

### Process Improvement

  - [Lack of standardized processes and SOPs slows down work and onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
  - [Need for better documentation on strategies, Content OS setup, and other key processes](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Suggestion to create step-by-step guides for tasks like keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Challenge in finding time to create these processes while managing current workload](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)

### Client Management

  - [Some clients (e.g., Sunbit) have extremely high content volume expectations (25 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)
  - [Need to better manage scope creep and small requests that accumulate over time](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Importance of setting clear expectations in statements of work (SOW)](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Suggestion to focus on impact and prioritization rather than just output volume](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

## Next Steps

  - Implement a pool of freelance editors to handle overflow and free up ME time
  - [Increase collaboration between Eric (Account Strategist) and Aida to improve client management](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=4244.0)
  - [Develop and document standardized processes for key tasks (e.g., keyword research, Content OS setup)](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
  - [Review and potentially adjust high-volume client expectations (e.g., Sunbit)](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)
  - [Explore ways to give MEs more time for strategic work and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=3501.0)
  - [Continue improving Atlas platform based on user feedback and comparison with Cloud Projects](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=2181.0)
  - [Implement skill mapping and standardization for CMs to ensure consistent quality](https://fathom.video/share/KTEz7jRYFByL_h7tHwQYAdrgLzRAc6Dc?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
